task_catalog.description: Phase-gated task definitions for the Product Assistant Agent. Each task defines allowed roles, required/forbidden primitives, and hard constraints for a given service phase.

mode_resolution.mode_rule: Role-pure work by the active specialist role
Named subset may perform the task when allowed_modes includes subset and the subset contains at least one allowed role; use allowed_subsets when present
Dynamic assembled team may perform the task when allowed_modes includes assembled and at least two assembled roles are in allowed_roles, unless assembled_team_requirements overrides this
Composite modes inherit the union of their constituent roles when the relevant composite mode is listed in allowed_modes

hard_constraints.constraint: Must not decide to proceed to discovery
Must summarise alignment, risks and unknowns
Must reference existing services or evidence
Must classify adoption level (adopt / innovate / transform)
Must summarise evidence, not recommend progression

intent_patterns.pattern: what are we trying to learn

hard_constraints.constraint: Must not assume a solution exists
Must not commit to a solution design
Must reference existing systems and dependencies

task.name: Map content landscape and identify gaps

hard_constraints.constraint: Must not assume content needs without evidence

task.name: Map information landscape and findability problems

hard_constraints.constraint: Must reference specific legislation or policy

task.name: Assess appropriateness of AI for the problem

hard_constraints.constraint: Must surface fairness, accountability and transparency risks
Must not approve or reject AI use
Must compare at least two options
Recommendation must be advisory not decisional
Must classify adoption level (adopt / innovate / transform)
Must include accessibility and inclusion requirements
Must present at least two options
Persona attributes not directly evidenced must be flagged as Assumptions
Must state that personas are provisional and require validation
Must include accessibility needs for each persona

task.name: Plan research operations and participant handling

hard_constraints.constraint: Must make consent, incentives, and scheduling visible
Must not imply ethics or safeguarding approval

task.name: Run a structured multi-role design debate

hard_constraints.constraint: Must use the framing, round, panel, and audit rules in references/debate-engine.xml
Must not start debate rounds before framing confirmation has been offered
Must present the final output as a recommendation, not a decision
Must articulate what has not been proven
Must compare at least two options

intent_patterns.pattern: how will we know alpha worked

hard_constraints.constraint: Must include what alpha will not prove
Must present at least two approaches
Must favour thin, testable, disposable slices
Must compare at least two options
Must present options for content governance
Must present content options for testing
Must present alternative structures for testing
Must flag for specialist legal review

task.name: Evaluate AI prototype against ethical criteria

hard_constraints.constraint: Must assess against relevant ethical framework
Must compare at least two options
Recommendation must be advisory not decisional
Must classify adoption level (adopt / innovate / transform)
Must include accessibility and inclusion requirements
Must present at least two options
Persona attributes not directly evidenced must be flagged as Assumptions
Must state that personas are provisional and require validation
Must include accessibility needs for each persona

task.name: Plan research operations and participant handling

hard_constraints.constraint: Must make consent, incentives, and scheduling visible
Must not imply ethics or safeguarding approval
Must compare at least two patterns

task.name: Shape solution boundaries and integration route

hard_constraints.constraint: Must make identity, data, and connector boundaries explicit
Must not assume unapproved connectors or tenant permissions
Must quantify uncertainty or state why it cannot be quantified
Must surface fairness, drift, or proxy risk where relevant

task.name: Run a structured multi-role design debate

hard_constraints.constraint: Must use the framing, round, panel, and audit rules in references/debate-engine.xml
Must not start debate rounds before framing confirmation has been offered
Must present the final output as a recommendation, not a decision

intent_patterns.pattern: are we ready to go live

hard_constraints.constraint: Must reference Service Standard criteria descriptively
Must reference Service Standard criteria descriptively
Must assess failure modes and recovery
Must compare at least two options
Recommendation must be advisory not decisional
Must surface evidence gaps against each Service Standard point
Must reference specific Service Standard criteria
Must classify adoption level (adopt / innovate / transform)
Must include accessibility and inclusion requirements
Persona attributes not directly evidenced must be flagged as Assumptions
Must state that personas are provisional and require validation
Must include accessibility needs for each persona

task.name: Plan research operations and participant handling

hard_constraints.constraint: Must make consent, incentives, and scheduling visible
Must not imply ethics or safeguarding approval
Must compare at least two patterns

task.name: Shape solution boundaries and integration route

hard_constraints.constraint: Must make identity, data, and connector boundaries explicit
Must not assume unapproved connectors or tenant permissions
Must quantify uncertainty or state why it cannot be quantified
Must surface fairness, drift, or proxy risk where relevant
Must make owner, permissions, connectors, labels, audit, and rollback visible

task.name: Run a structured multi-role design debate

hard_constraints.constraint: Must use the framing, round, panel, and audit rules in references/debate-engine.xml
Must not start debate rounds before framing confirmation has been offered
Must present the final output as a recommendation, not a decision

task.name: Monitor AI system for ethical drift
Review governance health in live service

hard_constraints.constraint: Must compare at least two options
Recommendation must be advisory not decisional
Must surface evidence gaps against each Service Standard point
Must reference specific Service Standard criteria
Must classify adoption level (adopt / innovate / transform)
Must include accessibility and inclusion requirements
Must be blameless — describe systemic conditions not individual failures
Persona attributes not directly evidenced must be flagged as Assumptions
Must state that personas are provisional and require validation
Must include accessibility needs for each persona
Must quantify uncertainty or state why it cannot be quantified
Must surface fairness, drift, or proxy risk where relevant
Must make owner, permissions, connectors, labels, audit, and rollback visible

task.name: Run a structured multi-role design debate

hard_constraints.constraint: Must use the framing, round, panel, and audit rules in references/debate-engine.xml
Must not start debate rounds before framing confirmation has been offered
Must present the final output as a recommendation, not a decision
